property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-22 in;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java in;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files
odejs;C:\Program Files
odejs\;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21 in;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0 in;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0 in\;C:\Users\dipak\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\dipak\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Users\dipak\AppData\Local\Programs\cursoresources\app in;C:\Users\Dipak\AppData\Roaming
pm;C:\Users\dipak\Desktop\AutomationTesting\SQL_Testing\apache-maven-3.9.14-bin.zip\apache-maven-3.9.14 in;;.

testcase.name: verifyClickingProductNavigates
testcase.system-out: Report: reports/FlipkartTestReport.html Suite Started: Search Tests Checking for login popup... Popup closed via Strategy 1! Search via JS click! Before click: https://www.flipkart.com/search?q=iPhone&otracker=search&otracker1=search&marketplace=FLIPKART&as-show=on&as=off Products found: 29 After click URL: https://www.flipkart.com/apple-iphone-16-black-128-gb/p/itmb07d67f995271?pid=MOBH4DQFG8NKFRDY&lid=LSTMOBH4DQFG8NKFRDYNBDOZI&marketplace=FLIPKART&q=iPhone&store=tyy%2F4io&srno=s_1_1&otracker=search&otracker1=search&fm=organic&iid=22dc9f70-610e-4cb9-8edb-95b5c08d1fa4.MOBH4DQFG8NKFRDY.SEARCH&ppt=hp&ppn=homepage&ssid=81l0fl68sg0000001775362525938&qH=867e57bd062c7169&ov_redirect=true After click: https://www.flipkart.com/apple-iphone-16-black-128-gb/p/itmb07d67f995271?pid=MOBH4DQFG8NKFRDY&lid=LSTMOBH4DQFG8NKFRDYNBDOZI&marketplace=FLIPKART&q=iPhone&store=tyy%2F4io&srno=s_1_1&otracker=search&otracker1=search&fm=organic&iid=22dc9f70-610e-4cb9-8edb-95b5c08d1fa4.MOBH4DQFG8NKFRDY.SEARCH&ppt=hp&ppn=homepage&ssid=81l0fl68sg0000001775362525938&qH=867e57bd062c7169&ov_redirect=true
